author: Understand
text:
Decouple sync's state-branch leg from the code remote

bl sync gated all of sync_with_remote behind git_has_remote(root, <code remote>), so a hub-linked client with a reachable state_remote but no code origin silently skipped the balls/tasks leg too. Split the gate so the main leg keys off the code remote and the state leg off the resolved state_remote; single-repo stays byte-identical (state_present reuses code_present, no extra git invocation).

resolve_state_remote degrades to single-repo behavior on an unreadable config rather than failing the command. cmd_repair moved to commands/repair.rs for the 300-line limit; hub-only regression test added to the state_remote suite.
